mapper.select: SELECT id, creation_time AS creationTime, reimbursement_title AS reimbursementTitle, reimburser_id AS reimburserId, reim_department_id AS reimDepartmentId, reim_company_id AS reimCompanyId, business_type_id AS businessTypeId, business_trip_reason AS businessTripReason, subsidy_total AS subsidyTotal, meal_allowance AS mealAllowance, transportation_allowance AS transportationAllowance, phone_allowance AS phoneAllowance, remarks, status FROM fk_reim_main WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, main_id AS mainId, traveler_id AS travelerId, departure_city_no AS departureCityNo, arrival_city_no AS arrivalCityNo, departure_date AS departureDate, arrival_date AS arrivalDate, trip_remark AS tripRemark, create_time AS createTime FROM fk_reim_trip WHERE main_id = #{mainId} ORDER BY create_time

SELECT id, main_id AS mainId, trip_id AS tripId, traveler_id AS travelerId, travel_date_range AS travelDateRange, subsidy_days AS subsidyDays, trip_route AS tripRoute, subsidy_city_no AS subsidyCityNo, apply_amount AS applyAmount, subsidy_amount AS subsidyAmount, meal_allowance AS mealAllowance, transportation_allowance AS transportationAllowance, phone_allowance AS phoneAllowance FROM fk_reim_subsidy WHERE main_id = #{mainId} ORDER BY id

SELECT d.id, d.subsidy_id AS subsidyId, d.detail_date AS detailDate, d.week_day AS weekDay, d.city_no AS cityNo, d.meal_std AS mealStd, d.meal_amount AS mealAmount, d.transport_std AS transportStd, d.transport_amount AS transportAmount, d.phone_std AS phoneStd, d.phone_amount AS phoneAmount, d.is_selected AS selected FROM fk_reim_subsidy_detail d JOIN fk_reim_subsidy s ON d.subsidy_id = s.id WHERE s.main_id = #{mainId} ORDER BY d.detail_date

SELECT id, main_id AS mainId, reim_company_id AS reimCompanyId, project_id AS projectId, apportion_ratio AS apportionRatio, apportion_amount AS apportionAmount, sort_no AS sortNo FROM fk_reim_apportion WHERE main_id = #{mainId} ORDER BY sort_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fk_reim_main (id, creation_time, reimbursement_title, reimburser_id, reim_department_id, reim_company_id, business_type_id, business_trip_reason, subsidy_total, meal_allowance, transportation_allowance, phone_allowance, remarks, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{creationTime}, #{reimbursementTitle}, #{reimburserId}, #{reimDepartmentId}, #{reimCompanyId}, #{businessTypeId}, #{businessTripReason}, #{subsidyTotal}, #{mealAllowance}, #{transportationAllowance}, #{phoneAllowance}, #{remarks}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE fk_reim_main SET reimbursement_title = #{reimbursementTitle}, reimburser_id = #{reimburserId}, reim_department_id = #{reimDepartmentId}, reim_company_id = #{reimCompanyId}, business_type_id = #{businessTypeId}, business_trip_reason = #{businessTripReason}, subsidy_total = #{subsidyTotal}, meal_allowance = #{mealAllowance}, transportation_allowance = #{transportationAllowance}, phone_allowance = #{phoneAllowance}, remarks = #{remarks}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fk_reim_trip (id, main_id, traveler_id, departure_city_no, arrival_city_no, departure_date, arrival_date, trip_remark, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{mainId}, #{travelerId}, #{departureCityNo}, #{arrivalCityNo}, #{departureDate}, #{arrivalDate}, #{tripRemark}, #{createTime})

INSERT INTO fk_reim_subsidy (id, main_id, trip_id, traveler_id, travel_date_range, subsidy_days, trip_route, subsidy_city_no, apply_amount, subsidy_amount, meal_allowance, transportation_allowance, phone_allowance) VALUES (#{id}, #{mainId}, #{tripId}, #{travelerId}, #{travelDateRange}, #{subsidyDays}, #{tripRoute}, #{subsidyCityNo}, #{applyAmount}, #{subsidyAmount}, #{mealAllowance}, #{transportationAllowance}, #{phoneAllowance})

INSERT INTO fk_reim_subsidy_detail (id, subsidy_id, detail_date, week_day, city_no, meal_std, meal_amount, transport_std, transport_amount, phone_std, phone_amount, is_selected) VALUES (#{id}, #{subsidyId}, #{detailDate}, #{weekDay}, #{cityNo}, #{mealStd}, #{mealAmount}, #{transportStd}, #{transportAmount}, #{phoneStd}, #{phoneAmount}, #{selected})

INSERT INTO fk_reim_apportion (id, main_id, reim_company_id, project_id, apportion_ratio, apportion_amount, sort_no) VALUES (#{id}, #{mainId}, #{reimCompanyId}, #{projectId}, #{apportionRatio}, #{apportionAmount}, #{sortNo})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM fk_reim_subsidy_detail WHERE subsidy_id IN (SELECT id FROM fk_reim_subsidy WHERE main_id = #{mainId})
